title: postapiauthloginvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/login authenticates an active user with valid credentials, sets an httpOnly JWT auth cookie, and returns a 200 response with the authenticated user payload.

title: postapiauthlogoutclearauthcookie
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/logout clears the authentication cookie and returns a 200 logout success response when called with a valid auth cookie.

title: getapiauthprofileauthenticateduser
description: Verify that GET /api/auth/profile returns the current authenticated user profile with a 200 response when called with a valid auth cookie, and returns 401 Unauthorized without auth cookie.

title: postapiauthpublicregistercreatesinactiveaccount
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/public-register creates an inactive employee account, queues an activation email, and returns a 200 or 201 response without requiring authentication.

title: postapiauthactivateactivatesaccountwithtoken
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/activate activates a user account when provided a valid backend-issued activation token and returns a 200 response.

title: postapiauthforgotpasswordsendsresetemail
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/forgot-password sends a password reset email for an active user and returns a safe 200 response without revealing account existence for unknown emails.

title: postapiauthchangepasswordrequiresauth
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/change-password changes the password for an authenticated user and returns appropriate success, and returns 401 Unauthorized if called without auth cookie.

title: getapiuserslistsuperadminusersafe
description: Verify that GET /api/users returns a list of users with production-safe roles only, accessible only by authenticated Superadmin users, returning 200 on success.

title: postapiusersidemployeeprofilecreatesprofile
description: Verify that POST /api/users/[id]/employee-profile creates an employee profile linked to the registered user with the given id, returning 200 on success and 404 if user does not exist.

title: postapiauthlogininvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/login with incorrect password returns 401 with AUTH_INVALID_CREDENTIALS error, and login with inactive user returns 403 with AUTH_USER_INACTIVE error.
